details.productUrlName: The Encounter A Dark Realm Battleground Oversized

customAttributes.description:
Difficulty: Easy
Ursula doesn't draw additional cards for lore each turn.
Player Abilities
Lore Cost — Effect
1 — Remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.
2 — Ready or exert chosen character.
3 — Chosen player draws 2 cards.

A Dark Realm
Difficulty: Normal

Player Abilities
Lore Cost — Effect
1 — Chosen character gets +2 Strength this turn.
2 — Chosen character gains Resist +1 until the start of your next turn.
3 — Each player except Ursula draws a card.
